name: popkit-dev
description: Complete development workflow plugin - feature development, git operations, GitHub management, and daily routines
author: Joseph Cannon <joseph@thehouseofdeals.com>

commands.name: dev
commands.description: Feature development workflow with 7-phase guided process

commands.name: git
commands.description: Git operations - commit, push, pr, review, ci, release, publish

commands.name: issue
commands.description: GitHub issue management - create, list, view, close, comment, edit, link

commands.name: milestone
commands.description: Milestone management - list, create, close, report, health tracking

commands.name: worktree
commands.description: Git worktree management for isolated development

commands.name: routine
commands.description: Morning health checks and nightly cleanup routines
